channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1846] replay-single test_70a: @@@@@@ FAIL: dd failed when run ofd+ldiskfs
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/955300c8-f444-11e1-b3b2-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_70a failed with the following error:

dd failed on client-28vm1

== replay-single test 70a: check multi client t-f ==================================================== 23:58:57 (1346482737)
mount clients client-28vm1,client-28vm2.lab.whamcloud.com ...
Starting client client-28vm1,client-28vm2.lab.whamcloud.com: -o user_xattr,acl,flock client-28vm7@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: client-28vm1,client-28vm2.lab.whamcloud.com
running=\$(mount | grep -c /mnt/lustre' ');
rc=0;
if [ \$running -eq 0 ] ; then
mkdir -p /mnt/lustre;
mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl,flock client-28vm7@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre;
rc=\$?;
fi;
exit \$rc
Started clients client-28vm1,client-28vm2.lab.whamcloud.com:
CMD: client-28vm1,client-28vm2.lab.whamcloud.com mount | grep /mnt/lustre' '
client-28vm7@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,user_xattr,acl,flock)
client-28vm7@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,user_xattr,acl,flock)
CMD: client-28vm1 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/1.4-gcc/bin:/usr/kerberos/sbin:/usr/kerberos/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh set_default_debug \"0x33f0404\" \" 0xffb7e3ff\" 32
Write/read files on /mnt/lustre ; clients client-28vm1,client-28vm2.lab.whamcloud.com ...
replay-single test_70a: @@@@@@ FAIL: dd failed on client-28vm1
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3639:error_noexit()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3661:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/replay-single.sh:1836:test_70a()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3894:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3923:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3797:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/replay-single.sh:1848:main()
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-31/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8737_-7f30cb5e4360/replay-single.test_70a.*.1346482761.log
CMD: client-28vm1,client-28vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-28vm7,client-28vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-31/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8737_-7f30cb5e4360/replay-single.test_70a.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1346482761.log;
dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2012-08-31/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-el5-x86_64_8737_-7f30cb5e4360/replay-single.test_70a.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1346482761.log
Info required for matching: replay-single 70a
item.summary: replay-single test_70a: @@@@@@ FAIL: dd failed when run ofd+ldiskfs

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
